calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Continued To Dec-31-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Demurrer; Demurrer To Petitioner'S Verified First Amended Petition For Declaratory And Injunctive Relief; Declaration Of Allan J. Besbris; And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Priot to Open Court Mr. Mesbris appears for respondent in an abundance of caution. The clerk informs counsel to submit a proposed order which is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling. At 9:01 at the instruction of the court, the clerk releases counsel since there is no other appearance and no notice to contest was recevied.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT AKA MARKETING LLC Demurrer To Petitioner'S Verified First Amended Petition For Declaratory And Injunctive Relief.

Respondent AKA Marketing, LLC's demurrer to Petitioner Muldoon Elder's first amended petition for declaratory and injunctive relief is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.

(see word minutes for full details)

The two proposed orders submitted by counsel prio to the hearing are incomplete and rejected.

A third proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
